sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We may collect: Account information (name, username, email), Event participation data, Attendance data (QR-based verification), and Device and usage data (logs, interactions).

sections.title: 2. How We Use Information
sections.content: We use your data to: Provide and maintain the platform, Manage event participation and attendance, Improve performance and user experience, and Ensure platform security and prevent misuse.

sections.title: 3. Data Sharing
sections.content: We do not sell your personal data. Event organizers may access participant data only for events they manage. Data may be shared if required by law.

sections.title: 4. Data Security
sections.content: We implement industry-standard measures to protect your data, including secure authentication, encrypted communication, and signed QR payloads (no sensitive data exposed).

sections.title: 5. Data Retention
sections.content: We retain data only as long as necessary to provide services and comply with legal obligations.

sections.title: 6. Your Rights
sections.content: You may: Update your information, Request account deletion, and Contact us regarding your data.

sections.title: 7. Changes to Policy
sections.content: We may update this policy. Continued use of the platform implies acceptance.

sections.title: 1. Use of Service
sections.content: You must provide accurate account information. You are responsible for your account activity.

sections.title: 2. Event Participation
sections.content: Users may join and participate in events. Attendance may be tracked using QR-based systems.

sections.title: 3. Organizer Responsibilities
sections.content: Organizers manage event content and participants. Fuseon is not responsible for event outcomes or disputes.

sections.title: 4. Acceptable Use
sections.content: You agree NOT to: Attempt unauthorized access or exploit the system, Interfere with platform functionality, or Use fake QR codes or impersonate others.

sections.title: 5. Platform Availability
sections.content: We may modify or discontinue features at any time without notice.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: Fuseon is provided 'as is' without warranties. We are not liable for damages arising from use of the platform.

sections.title: 7. Termination
sections.content: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.

sections.title: 8. Changes to Terms
sections.content: We may update these terms. Continued use implies acceptance.
